distribute.title: Distribution Orders
distribute.no_active_orders_hint: Click 'Create order' to plan an aid distribution.
distribute.busy_hint: {{count}} worker(s) hidden — currently out for delivery on another order.
distribute.delete_confirm: Delete this order? This cannot be undone.
distribute.flag_new_need_prompt: Flag a new urgent need at this family?

delivery_confirm.title: Confirm delivery
delivery_confirm.next_items_hint: What items will this family need on the next visit? Saved on the family card so the wizard suggests them next time.
delivery_confirm.medical_notes_hint: Anything observed about the family's health (new symptoms, medications running low, follow-up needed). Saved on the family record.
delivery_confirm.medical_notes_placeholder: e.g. Mother reports child's fever returned; insulin supply down to 2 days.
delivery_confirm.general_notes_hint: Anything else the team should know about this delivery. Saved on the order and on the family.
delivery_confirm.general_notes_placeholder: e.g. Family is grateful, requested more drinking water next time.
delivery_confirm.flag_new_need_hint: Marks the family with a NEW NEED badge so it surfaces on the family card and bumps priority on next recompute.

distribute.assign_to_prompt: Enter the user_id to assign this order to (leave blank to unassign):
distribute.ai_helper_title: Ask AidFlow Assistant about this family
distribute.ai_helper_placeholder: e.g. What items does this family need?
distribute.no_available_workers: No workers available — every field worker and supervisor is currently out for delivery on another order.
distribute.schedule_hint: Optional. Leave blank to dispatch on demand. The order stays Pending until you click Dispatch.
distribute.edit_at_least_one_item: Add at least one item before saving.
distribute.reassign_blocked_in_flight: Worker is en route — cancel or wait for completion to reassign
distribute.duplicate_warning: This family received aid {{n}} day(s) ago. Continue?
distribute.dispatch_needs_worker: Assign a worker first — orders cannot be dispatched without one.
distribute.fail_modal_hint: Tell the team why the delivery couldn't be completed so it can be followed up.
distribute.cancel_modal_hint: Why is this order being cancelled? This is recorded in the order history.
distribute.fail_modal_placeholder: e.g. Family not home; access road blocked; refused delivery.
distribute.cancel_modal_placeholder: e.g. Family relocated; duplicate order; no longer needed.
distribute.error_no_items: At least one item with a positive quantity is required before saving an order.
distribute.schedule_past: Scheduled date cannot be in the past.
distribute.schedule_too_far: Scheduled date cannot be more than 1 year in the future.

assistant.title: AidFlow Assistant
assistant.placeholder: Ask anything about families, protocols, or aid items…
assistant.proposed_changes: Proposed change(s) below — review and Apply.
assistant.use_rag_locked: Knowledge-base search is always on for this page.
assistant.system_note: Powered by your local Gemma 4 E4B — your data never leaves this device.

examples.title: Example queries
examples.q1: Which families need medical supplies in Sector B?
examples.q2: Summarize the cholera response protocol for field workers.
examples.q3: How should I prioritize family F-0042 today?

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Upload PDF protocols and aid usage guides. AidFlow Assistant will reference them when answering.
knowledge.drop_zone: Drop PDFs here or click to browse
knowledge.no_docs_hint: Upload a PDF protocol to get started.
knowledge.search_placeholder: Search by title, category, filename, or content…
knowledge.no_matches_hint: Try a different keyword, or clear the search to see the full library.
knowledge.matched_in_content: Matched inside the document content, not the title.
knowledge.summary_loading: Reading the document and writing a summary…
knowledge.summary_truncated: The document is longer than the model can read in one pass; the summary covers only the beginning. Ask follow-up questions for later sections.
knowledge.no_original_body: This document was uploaded before the original-PDF storage feature shipped (or the file was too large). Re-upload the PDF to enable original-language download.
knowledge.popup_blocked_body: Allow pop-ups for this site so the PDF export window can open.
knowledge.scanned_warning: This PDF was uploaded but no text could be extracted. It looks like a scanned image PDF without an OCR text layer. The AI cannot read or summarize it until you re-upload an OCR'd version.
knowledge.scanned_tooltip: No text was extracted from this PDF. It looks like a scanned image without OCR — the AI cannot read or summarize it.
knowledge.delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This removes the PDF and its extracted chunks from your library. This action cannot be undone.
knowledge.bad_file_body: You dropped a non-PDF file. The Knowledge Base only ingests PDF documents.
knowledge.partial_embed_body: {{missing}} of {{total}} chunks could not be embedded — Ollama may have been unreachable mid-ingest. The document is still searchable via keyword fallback, but semantic search quality will be lower until you re-upload while Ollama is online.
knowledge.ask_question: Ask a question about your documents

kids.title: Emotional Support
kids.subtitle: Age-appropriate documents, stories, images, and videos to help children cope with disasters and crisis situations.
kids.generate_tooltip: Generate trauma-informed content in any supported language with the local AI.
kids.delete_body_2: from the library. This cannot be undone.

kids_gen.title: Generate emotional-support content
kids_gen.disclaimer: AI-assisted draft. Review for cultural fit, age-appropriateness, and trauma-informed framing before using with children. Not a substitute for trained child-psychology expertise.
kids_gen.theme_returning_to_school: Returning to school after a disaster
kids_gen.theme_required: Please pick or enter a theme.
kids_gen.situation_placeholder: e.g. 8-year-old who lost their dog in a flood; very anxious at bedtime
kids_gen.title_required: Please give the content a title before saving.
kids_gen.body_required: The content body is empty — generate or write something first.
kids_gen.footer_form: AI runs locally on your laptop via Ollama.
kids_gen.footer_streaming: You can stop and start over after the stream finishes.
kids_gen.footer_review: Edit the title and content, then save to the library.

guides.title: Aid Usage Guides
guides.subtitle: How-to guides for distributed items.
guides.ask_gemma: Ask AidFlow Assistant about this guide

chat.title: Bitchat — Install Guide
chat.guide_subtitle: Install Bitchat on every team phone for offline mesh communication when cellular networks are down.
chat.why_body: Bitchat is a free, open-source messenger that uses Bluetooth mesh networking — no internet, no SIM card, no servers.
chat.no_apk_yet: No APK uploaded yet. An organisation admin can upload one in Settings while online; field teams can then download it offline.
chat.test_step1: Two team members install Bitchat on their phones.
chat.test_step2: Both pick the same channel — for example #test.
chat.test_step3: From within ~30 m line-of-sight, one sends "hello".
chat.test_step4: Confirm the other receives it. If yes, the mesh is working — schedule training.
chat.org_rec1: Use sector-based channel names matching your AidFlow Pro sectors.
chat.org_rec3: Brief everyone on Bitchat's privacy model.
chat.org_rec4: If a phone is lost, it can't be remotely wiped — keep tactical info short.

android.step1_body: Tap the download button at the top of this page (if your admin uploaded an APK), or get it from
android.step2_body: Open Settings → Apps → Special access → Install unknown apps, find your browser, and toggle Allow.
android.step3_body: Open your Downloads folder, tap bitchat.apk, then tap Install.
android.step4_body: On first launch, Bitchat asks for Bluetooth and Location permissions. Both are required for BLE mesh discovery.
android.step5_body: Pick a short nickname matching your role (e.g. FW-Pierre or MED-Carmen).
android.step6_body: Tap the # icon to add channels matching what your AidFlow Pro org uses.

chat.settings_help: Upload an .apk file once while online. Field teams connecting to this AidFlow instance can then download Bitchat offline. Get the latest APK from {{url}}.

settings.title: Settings
settings.connection_fail: Cannot reach Ollama. Make sure it is running with OLLAMA_ORIGINS=*
settings.reset_confirm: This will erase all local data and reload the demo seed. Continue?
settings.about_tagline: AI-powered humanitarian aid distribution platform, built for the Gemma 4 Good Hackathon.
settings.about_model: Inference is powered by Gemma 4 E4B running locally via Ollama. Embeddings (when available) use nomic-embed-text. The app is fully offline-first; no family data ever leaves the device.
settings.gemma_trademark: Gemma is a trademark of Google LLC.
settings.about_disclaimer: AidFlow Pro is independently developed and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Google.
settings.about_license: AidFlow Pro source: MIT License. Gemma model weights: governed by Google's Gemma Terms of Use.

reports.title: Reports
reports.summary_placeholder: Click Generate AI summary to produce an executive brief.

import.title: Import families from spreadsheet
import.button_tooltip: Bulk import families from a CSV or XLSX spreadsheet
import.inline_hint: Have a spreadsheet of families? Import each row into this form for review.
import.empty_file: No data rows found in the spreadsheet.
import.skip_row_tooltip: Discard this row and move to the next
import.cancel_tooltip: Stop the import — remaining rows are discarded
import.tip_synonyms: Headers don't need to match exactly — synonyms work (e.g. "HoH", "Household Head", "IDP" → recently_displaced).
import.tip_unmapped: Unmapped columns are saved into Notes.
import.tip_id_note: Family IDs are generated automatically — do not include them.
import.drop_here: Drop a CSV or XLSX file here, or click to choose
import.formats_supported: Supported: .csv, .xlsx, .xls — first row must be headers
import.upload_hint: CSV or XLSX. The first row must be column names.
import.mapping_hint: {{n}} columns detected. Adjust the mapping if needed.

workers.title: Workers
workers.search_placeholder: Search by name, position, phone, email, or address…
workers.notes_placeholder: e.g. Owns a 4×4, certified for cholera response.
workers.required_names: First name and last name are required.
workers.cannot_delete_busy: This worker is currently out for delivery — finish or reassign their order first.
workers.empty_body: Add your first field worker to start assigning distribution orders.
workers.empty_filter_body: Try a different search or position filter.
workers.delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
workers.cannot_delete_pending: This worker is assigned to {{count}} pending order(s). Reassign or cancel them first.
workers.duplicate_warning: A worker with this name and position already exists.
workers.duplicate_id: Could not save — please try again (id collision).

paper_form.button_tip: Snap a photo of a paper registration form. The local AI reads each row offline.
paper_form.inline_hint: Have a paper form? Snap a photo and the local AI reads each row.
paper_form.duplicate_body: "{{name}}" with {{members}} members is already in the registry ({{id}}). Edit the existing family instead, or change the name / member count if this is a different household.
paper_form.duplicate_tooltip: Cannot apply — would duplicate {{id}}. Open that family to edit instead.
paper_form.title: Import families from a photo
paper_form.subtitle: Snap a paper form. The local AI reads each row offline. You review and Apply.
paper_form.pick_prompt: Upload a clear photo of a paper registration form or family tally sheet.
paper_form.pick_tip: JPG/PNG up to 25 MB. The image is processed locally — it never leaves this device.
paper_form.camera_tip: Hold the form steady and well-lit. Fill the frame — handwriting needs detail.
paper_form.camera_unsupported: This browser does not support webcam capture. Use Pick a file instead.
paper_form.camera_denied: Camera access was denied. Allow it in the browser permissions, or use Pick a file.
paper_form.camera_none: No camera was found on this device. Use Pick a file.
paper_form.camera_busy: The camera is in use by another app. Close it and try again.
paper_form.analyzing: Reading the form locally — this can take 30 s to a few minutes on a CPU.
paper_form.analyzing_tip: Multimodal inference is much heavier than text. Don't close this dialog.
paper_form.no_rows: No family rows were found in that photo.
paper_form.no_rows_tip: Try a clearer, well-lit photo, or use the Add family button to enter the data manually.
paper_form.review_intro: Found {{count}} candidate family/families. Review and Apply each one.
paper_form.privacy: The image is processed on this device via Ollama. It is not uploaded anywhere.

families_delete.title: Delete family?
families_delete.body: Soft-delete the family record for {{name}}. Historic distribution rows referencing this family will keep working, but the family will no longer appear in the registry.
families_delete.reason_placeholder: e.g. relocated out of operational area; duplicate of F-0123; data entry error
families_delete.reason_hint: Required. At least {{min}} characters. Stored on the row for audit.
families_delete.reason_too_short: Enter a reason of at least 4 characters before deleting.

families_edit.duplicate_error: A family "{{name}}" with {{members}} members already exists ({{id}}). Open that family to edit instead of creating a duplicate.
families_edit.has_pregnant_member: Has a pregnant or nursing member
families_edit.medical_conditions_hint: Add one condition per row. Mark severity in parentheses, e.g. "diabetes (chronic)" or "cholera exposure (critical)".
families_edit.notes_placeholder: Anything the team should know about this family.
families_edit.confirm_delete: Delete the record for {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
